stemHtml: What is the correct statement about right of way?

options.a: Power-driven heavier-than-air aircraft shall give way to airships, gliders and balloons.
options.b: Gliders do not give way to balloons.
options.c: Gliders shall give way to airships and balloons.
options.d: All aircraft shall give way to aircraft which are seen to be towing other aircraft.
